description: Style Note Block the elements and look sporty in this fabulous cap from lee. The soft fabric keeps your head cool and dry all day. Team it with jeans, tees and sneakers to complete your sporty fashion statement. Product Details Embroidered eyelets on the crown Curved visor with stitch detailing Branding appliqué d and graphic print on the front Adjustable back strap Material and Care 100% cotton Dry clean only
